title: Assistant Store Manager - Asian Paints Signature Store - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Asian Paints Signature Store - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Asian Paints Signature Store are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Asian Paints Signature Store:
Asian Paints Signature Store is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store!
